question.text: SEBI may suspend any office-bearer of which of the following entities from holding such position under the PFUTP Regulations?

answer.text: Of any stock exchange or self-regulatory organisation

explanation.text: **The Logic:** SEBI may suspend any office-bearer of any stock exchange or self-regulatory organisation from holding such position as one of its enforcement actions under the PFUTP Regulations. **The Trap:** Option D is incorrect - this specific power relates to stock exchanges and SROs, not listed companies. SEBI has separate powers for listed companies. **Cross-Exam Context:** SEBI's powers over stock exchange officials are also tested in NISM Series III-B. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** This power ensures that even stock exchange officials cannot escape accountability for complicity in fraudulent practices.
